prose: HOSPITAL — the London variant. Index finger traces a cross on the opposite upper arm. Palm faces the signer during the tracing.

gaps.reason: description says 'traces a cross' but does not anchor the starting finger direction; London-variant vs. Midlands/North variants differ in whether the finger starts pointing contralaterally or up
gaps.suggested_question: At the start of the cross, does the index fingertip point toward the non-dominant side (contralateral) or up the arm?

notes: Regional tag mentioned; parser should flag variant sensitivity.
